inbound.context: - [ADR-0000: Core Premise](0000-core-premise.md)
Trails implementations never throw. That's a hard rule — [ADR-0000](0000-core-premise.md) established it. Input in, `Result` out. The warden enforces it. If an implementation throws, it's a bug.
- [ADR-0000: Core Premise](0000-core-premise.md) — the foundational decisions, particularly "the trail is the product" and "derive by default"
